title: Wow + a winner
excerpt: WOW. I am blown away by all the good things you commented about in the Project Life giveaway. And the lucky randomly chosen winner is: Stacey Hunt said...I'm Stacey from Slidell, Louisiana. I have 3 boys asking for their school…
body:
WOW. I am blown away by all the good things you commented about in the Project Life giveaway. And the lucky randomly chosen winner is:

Stacey Hunt said...I'm Stacey from Slidell, Louisiana. I have 3 boys asking for their school days albums . . . guess I better get started!! They are my motivation for scrapbooking and I LOVE Project Life albums!! It makes scrapbooking DO-able!!

Congrats Stacey! Please email winner(at)amytangerine(dot)com with your mailing address. UPDATED 4/24: Haven't heard from Stacey yet, so if she doesn't email by Friday, April 27th, I will be picking another winner. Thanks! I am taking off later today to teach again in Sparks, NV. Happy Friday!
